all.en: Dear Accounts Receivable team at Brightline Logistics Services.
all.zh: 親愛的 Brightline Logistics Services 應收帳款團隊。

all.en: I am writing to formally dispute invoice number BL-2026-04832.
all.zh: 本人謹此正式對發票編號 BL-2026-04832 提出爭議。

all.en: The invoice is dated April 28 and totals seventeen thousand euros.
all.zh: 該發票日期為 4 月 28 日，總金額為 17,000 歐元。

all.en: Our review found three discrepancies that require your attention.
all.zh: 我們審查後發現三項待您處理的差異。

all.en: First, fuel surcharges were billed at five percent above contract rate.
all.zh: 第一，燃油附加費較合約費率超收 5%。

all.en: Our master agreement, section four, caps surcharges at three percent.
all.zh: 我方主合約第四節已將附加費上限訂為 3%。

all.en: Second, the invoice lists fifteen shipments to the Lyon warehouse.
all.zh: 第二，發票列出 15 批前往 Lyon 倉庫之貨運。

all.en: Our records confirm only thirteen shipments were received and signed for.
all.zh: 我方紀錄僅確認收到並簽收 13 批。

all.en: We have attached copies of signed delivery notes for verification.
all.zh: 已附上已簽收之送貨單影本供查證。

all.en: Third, the invoice charges weekend handling for Monday deliveries.
all.zh: 第三，發票就週一交貨案件收取週末處理費。

all.en: Per appendix B, weekend rates apply only to Saturday and Sunday work.
all.zh: 依附錄 B，週末費率僅適用於週六與週日作業。

all.en: These three issues total an overcharge of three thousand two hundred euros.
all.zh: 上述三項問題共溢收 3,200 歐元。

all.en: Please issue a credit note for the disputed amount within fifteen days.
all.zh: 請於 15 天內就爭議金額開立貸項通知書。

all.en: We will process payment of the undisputed balance once the credit is received.
all.zh: 收到貸項通知後，我方將支付無爭議部分之餘款。

all.en: Until then, the full invoice is placed on hold in our system.
all.zh: 在此之前，整張發票將於我方系統內暫予擱置。

all.en: We value our long-standing partnership and prefer a quick resolution.
all.zh: 我方珍視長期合作關係，希望盡快解決此事。

all.en: Please contact me directly to discuss the supporting evidence.
all.zh: 請直接與我聯繫以討論相關佐證資料。

all.en: I can be reached at extension 6210 between nine and five.
all.zh: 我於 9 點至 17 點可透過分機 6210 聯繫。

all.en: Alternatively, you may reply to this email with revised documents.
all.zh: 或您亦可回覆本郵件並附上修正後文件。

all.en: We also request a brief root cause analysis to prevent repeat errors.
all.zh: 我方亦請提供簡要根本原因分析以防再發生。

all.en: Our finance review committee meets every Wednesday afternoon.
all.zh: 我方財務審查委員會每週三下午召開會議。

all.en: Your prompt response will help us close the matter before month end.
all.zh: 您的迅速回應將有助我們在月底前結案。

all.en: Thank you for your cooperation and continued service to our company.
all.zh: 感謝您的配合及對本公司之持續服務。

all.en: Sincerely, Pavel Rodriguez, Senior Procurement Manager at Halcyon Trading.
all.zh: 敬上，Halcyon Trading 資深採購經理 Pavel Rodriguez。
